1 A grandchild is teaching her grandmother what she can do with smartphone.

🔖

Tap here to start

スマホで ラジオが 　　　　。

sumaho de rajio ga kikemasu.

You can listen to the radio on my smartphone.

2 What can you hear here?

🔖

Tap here to start

波なみの 音おとが 　　　　　。

nami no oto ga kikoemasu.

I can hear the sound of the waves.

3 What is the problem with this class?

🔖

Tap here to start

先生せんせいの 声こえが 　　　　　　。

sensee no koe ga kikoemasen.

I cannot hear the teacher's voice.
